content: ACE inhibitor dosing: lisinopril 2.5-5mg daily start, target 20-40mg daily; enalapril 2.5mg BID start, target 10-20mg BID; ramipril 1.25-2.5mg daily start, target 10mg daily. ARB dosing: losartan 25-50mg daily start, target 50-100mg daily; valsartan 40-80mg BID start, target 160-320mg daily; candesartan 4-8mg daily start, target 16-32mg daily. Start low in heart failure, elderly, or volume-depleted patients. Titrate every 2-4 weeks to target doses proven in trials. Monitor serum creatinine and potassium at baseline, 1-2 weeks after initiation/dose increase, then periodically. Accept up to 30% increase in creatinine from baseline; larger increases require evaluation for renal artery stenosis or volume depletion. Hold if potassium >5.5 mEq/L. Avoid combination ACEi+ARB due to increased adverse events without benefit. Use caution with NSAIDs (reduced efficacy, renal risk), potassium supplements, potassium-sparing diuretics.
